summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by adding a migration module (backend/migration.mo) that seeds the Ferrari Cheque product with the correct updated values (minOrderQuantity=300, color='Dark Grey'), and modifies backend/main.mo to use this migration and initialize the fabricProducts map with the same seeded data. The backend changes address the core requirement of fixing the seed data so getProducts returns the Ferrari Cheque product. The frontend-facing acceptance criteria (Products page and Home page displaying the product) are not directly verifiable from the diff, but no frontend changes were requested either — the requirement implies the frontend already works if the backend returns the data correctly.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate migration module (backend/migration.mo) with OldActor/NewActor types and a run() function was introduced, adding infrastructure for state migration between canister upgrades.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to fix the seed data in the backend. The migration pattern with OldActor, NewActor, and a Migration.run function wired via 'with migration = Migration.run' was not requested and introduces additional complexity beyond the stated requirement.
